entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A lepidopteran pest that affects legume crops like chickpea and pigeonpea

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The primary legume crop studied for pest management

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used to study the ovipositional preference of the pest

entities.name: PATANCHEM, ANDHRA PRADESH, INDIA
entities.description: The site where the research was conducted at ICRISAT

entities.name: PHEROMONE TRAP
entities.description: A tool used to capture male moths to study their activity and flight patterns

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An environmental factor that affects the catch of moths in pheromone traps

entities.name: HUMIDITY
entities.description: An environmental factor that affects the catch of moths in pheromone traps

entities.name: WIND VELOCITY
entities.description: An environmental factor that affects the catch of moths in pheromone traps

entities.name: FLOWER COLOR
entities.description: A characteristic of pigeonpea flowers that influences the ovipositional preference of the pest

entities.name: ENDOSULFAN
entities.description: A chemical treatment used to manage the larval population of the pest

entities.name: IPM
entities.description: Integrated Pest Management used as a profitable way to manage the pest

entities.name: NPV
entities.description: Nuclear Polyhedrosis Virus used as a treatment to reduce larval population

entities.name: ANNONA
entities.description: A botanical treatment used to reduce larval population

entities.name: NEEM
entities.description: A botanical treatment used to reduce larval population

entities.name: BIRD PERCHES
entities.description: A biological control method used to reduce larval population

entities.name: POD DAMAGE
entities.description: The percentage of damage caused to the crop pods by the pest

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per hectare

entities.name: COST-BENEFIT RATIO
entities.description: An economic measure used to determine the profitability of pest management treatments

entities.name: LARVAL POPULATION
entities.description: The population of the pest in its larval stage, which peaks at specific crop ages

relationships.description: used to monitor male moth activity
